title: Google strikes back! Gemini Omni, AI glasses, new models
summary: Google I/O announcement featuring Gemini Omni, a multimodal AI model, alongside Gemini 3.5 Flash, Gemini Spark, and new AI features including agentic search, personal intelligence systems, and XR glasses. The video also covers TPU 8 hardware and Antigravity 2.0 visualization tool.
